title: Saudi Arabian Broccoli Hash
description: A sour and shattering breakfast dish featuring Chinese broccoli, suitable for a sick day.
instructions: Heat a medium skillet over medium heat.
Add the olive oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped Chinese broccoli and cook until slightly tender.
Stir in the lemon juice, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped parsley and red pepper flakes.
Cook for an additional minute, until the broccoli is slightly caramelized.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Adjust seasoning as needed, and serve with your favorite accompaniments.
This dish is quite pungent, so be sure to have some crackers or bread on hand to mop up any excess juices.
If you're feeling under the weather, this dish is sure to clear your sinuses!
